title: teline nervosa
intro: Teline nervosa, also known as Bupleurum chinense or Chinese thorowax, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Teline nervosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu. Teline nervosa is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
